description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that uses the docker.io/jangorecki/r-base-dev image and runs the following shell commands: Rscript -e 'install.packages("microbenchmarkCore", repos="https://olafmersmann.github.io/drat")', R CMD build ., R CMD check $(ls -1t *.tar.gz | head -n 1) --no-manual --no-stop-on-test-error --run-dontrun --as-cran, mkdir -p cran/src/contrib, mv $(ls -1t *.tar.gz | head -n 1) cran/src/contrib, and Rscript -e 'tools::write_PACKAGES("cran/src/contrib", addFiles=TRUE)'; it archives the macrobenchmark.Rcheck directory and the cran directory as artifacts that expire in two weeks. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the docker.io/ubuntu image, runs mv cran public and cat public/src/contrib/PACKAGES, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact expiring in two weeks.
